search_no_results: No shortcut found for this search.
pending_users_subtitle: Approve or reject access requests for your tenant.
help_center_subtitle: Understand how to use the system and interpret the presented data.
help_what_is_system_p1: Health Data Insights (HDI) is a platform that organizes and analyzes health data to support decision-making in public management.
help_what_is_system_p2: The system allows you to identify trends, risks and monitor strategic health indicators in a simple and visual way.
help_navigation_p1: Use the side menu to access the system modules.
help_alerts_p1: Alerts indicate recent increases in disease cases.
help_alerts_p2: The higher the growth percentage, the higher the alert level.
help_alerts_p3: Use this module to identify situations that require immediate action.
help_risk_index_p2: Regions with higher risk should be prioritized for intervention.
help_dant_p1: The DANT module tracks health indicators aligned with the national 2021–2030 plan.
help_dant_p3: The system classifies the indicators as:
help_dant_p4: Use this module for medium- and long-term strategic planning.
help_interpretation_p1: The system does not just show numbers, it indicates trends and risks.
help_interpretation_p2: An increase in cases may indicate a need for preventive action, while indicators off track require strategic attention.
help_tips_item_2: Prioritize regions with higher Risk Index
help_tips_item_4: Use the data to support decisions and planning
industrial_dashboard_subtitle: Occupational health intelligence with public SINAN data
occupational_health_time_series: Time series of work accidents and RSI/MSD
industrial_data_note: Note: 2025 may represent a partial base, depending on SINAN availability.

forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
forgot_password_success: If an account exists for this email, we will send reset instructions.
forgot_password_error: We could not process your request right now.

reset_password_token_invalid: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset_password_min: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
type_email_to_enable: Enter your email to enable it.
type_email_to_enable_tenants: Enter a valid email to load tenants.
select_allowed_scope: Select the scope allowed for your user.
login_no_tenant: No tenant available for this user. Ask the administrator for access.
health_platform_sources: Data based on SINAN / DATASUS, DANT, IBGE and private sources

register_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters long
delete_user_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the user
no_pending_users: No pending users at the moment.

dashboard_login_required: You need to be logged in to view the dashboard.

no_state_disease_data: Not enough data for State x Disease.
municipal_tenant_epidemiological_data: Epidemiological data from the city tenant.
profile_manage_preferences: Manage your personal information and preferences.
avatar_preview_hint: Preview appears instantly; to persist it, click Save.
about_placeholder: Tell a bit about yourself and your goal in the system...

location_unavailable: Could not get your current position.
no_permission_page: You do not have permission to access this page.
analytics_subtitle_municipal: Charts and indicators for the municipality.
error_loading_data: An error occurred while loading the data.
data_subtitle: Explore raw data with filters, pagination and export.
export_login_required: You need to be signed in to export.
tenant_scope_applied: Municipal scope applied automatically by the tenant.
select_state_for_top_cities: Tip: select a state to see the top cities.
maps_unauthorized: Unauthorized (missing or expired token). Please sign in again.
no_data_for_current_filters: No data for the current filters.
territorial_risk_mode_hint: Territorial risk mode uses the epidemiological index aggregated by locality.
zoom_tip: Tip: zoom to switch between state and municipality views. The bbox limits the query to what is visible on screen when available.
risk_ranking_and_spatial_view: Risk ranking and spatial visualization based on case growth and volume.
no_data_for_selected_filters: No data found for the selected filters.
predictive_subtitle_municipal: Epidemiological forecast within the municipal tenant scope.
predictive_hint_municipal: Municipal tenant: forecast based on the municipality in JWT scope.
predictive_hint_brazil: Brazil tenant: forecast based on the national/filtered time series.
no_risk_points_for_selected_filters: No risk points found for the selected filters.
recent_growth_monitoring: Monitoring recent growth by disease and region.
no_alerts_for_current_filters: No alerts found for the current filters.
no_outbreaks_for_current_scope: No outbreaks detected for the current scope.
dant_module_subtitle: Strategic monitoring of noncommunicable chronic diseases, risk factors and conditions.
trajectory_comparison_subtitle: Comparison between current observed value, expected trajectory and final target.
fill_name_email_password: Fill in name, email, and password.
backend_endpoints_note: If your backend does not have these endpoints yet, the UI is ready. Then we only need to wire the contract.
city_hall_mode_access_note: City Hall mode: access is controlled by tenants (Brazil + city halls).
name_and_last_name_required: First and last name are required.
configure_access_tenants_status: Configure access, tenants, and status. (City Hall mode: the user scope comes from the tenant.)
email_is_user_key_note: Email is the user key. If you need to change it, we can add a specific endpoint later.
select_at_least_one_tenant: Select at least one tenant for the user.
super_admin_checkbox_outro: This profile administers all platform tenants and does not depend on the `br` tenant.
super_admin_tenant_binding_optional: Super-admin has global access. Tenant binding is optional.
user_will_only_see_marked_tenants: The user will only see in Login the tenants marked here.
confirm_deactivation_user_message: Are you sure you want to deactivate user {{name}}?
confirm_activation_user_message: Are you sure you want to activate user {{name}}?
confirm_delete_user_message: Are you sure you want to remove user {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
audit_log_subtitle: Record of actions performed by users
admin_users_placeholder: Placeholder: user list, actions (edit, reset password, activate/deactivate).
dant_trajectory_load_error: Could not load the indicator trajectory.
billing_page_subtitle: Track billing rules and the future tenant financial panel.
billing_page_notice: This is the initial foundation of the billing module. The policy is already defined; financial automation will still be integrated in the backend.
billing_current_scope_description: Operational billing view according to your access profile.
billing_scope_super_admin: As a super-admin, you will have global visibility and will be able to apply operational exceptions across tenants.
billing_scope_tenant_admin: As a tenant admin, you will typically see only your client's financial status.
billing_not_integrated_description: Financial states are not yet persisted in the backend. This page prepares navigation and the future experience.
billing_best_practice_tenant_level: Delinquency must be handled at the tenant level, never at the individual user level.
billing_best_practice_progressive: Notifications and suspension should be progressive: debt, grace period, read-only, and only then full lockout.
billing_best_practice_read_only: For public-sector clients, read-only mode is usually the best first suspension stage.
billing_best_practice_audit: Every status change should be auditable and allow super-admin override.
billing_states_description: States planned for the platform's financial flow.
billing_current_status_description: This status is already read from the backend and influences warnings and operational restrictions.
billing_tenants_super_admin_hint: As a super-admin, you can review and change the financial status of any tenant.
billing_tenants_admin_hint: As a tenant admin, you only see the tenants associated with your access.
billing_due_soon_message: Attention: the invoice is due within {{days}} day(s).
billing_active_details_description: This account is in good standing. Billing, contract, and payment details for the tenant will appear here.
billing_past_due_cta: This tenant is past due. Contact HDI finance, request the payment link, or send the payment proof.
billing_grace_period_cta: This tenant is in a grace period. Regularization should happen before operational suspension.
billing_suspended_read_only_cta: This tenant is suspended in read-only mode. Regularize payment and send proof for full reactivation.
billing_suspended_full_cta: This tenant is suspended. The next step is to contact finance and send proof of regularization.
billing_terminated_cta: This tenant is terminated. Any resumption depends on contractual and financial validation with the HDI team.
billing_status_panel_description: Only the tenant's current financial status is enabled for action.
billing_proof_note_placeholder: Example: Payment completed via bank transfer at 2:20 PM.
billing_proof_helper_text: This flow prepares the email to finance. The attachment still needs to be added manually in your email client.
billing_mail_body_contact: Hello, HDI team.%0D%0A%0D%0AI need financial support for tenant {{tenant}}.%0D%0ADue date: {{due_date}}.%0D%0ACurrent finance contact: {{contact}}.%0D%0A%0D%0AThank you.
billing_mail_body_payment: Hello, HDI team.%0D%0A%0D%0AI would like to receive the payment link or payment instructions for tenant {{tenant}}.%0D%0ADue date: {{due_date}}.%0D%0A%0D%0AThank you.
billing_mail_body_proof: Hello, HDI team.%0D%0A%0D%0AI am sending the payment proof for tenant {{tenant}}.%0D%0ASelected file name: {{file_name}}.%0D%0ANote: {{note}}.%0D%0A%0D%0APlease also manually attach the file in your email client before sending.
billing_notes_placeholder: Example: April invoice still open. Client indicated payment by Friday.
billing_banner_past_due: There is an outstanding balance. Access remains normal, but tenant admins should regularize the situation.
billing_banner_grace_period: The tenant is in a grace period. Regularization should happen before operational suspension.
billing_banner_suspended_read_only: The tenant is suspended in read-only mode. Writes and sensitive actions are blocked.
billing_banner_suspended_full: The tenant is suspended. Access is restricted until financial regularization.
billing_next_step_description: The next step is to turn this policy into actual system functionality.
billing_next_step_line_1: Model tenant financial status and billing event history.
billing_next_step_line_2: Add middleware to block writes or full access according to the current state.
billing_next_step_line_3: Show banners and suspension pages with clear context for tenant admins.
hdi_control_center_subtitle: Operational view of portfolio health, billing, and tenant/customer account health across the platform.
hdi_control_center_note: In this MVP, each tenant is treated as the operational account unit. The next step is to model a separate customer entity and connect contracts, contacts, and multiple tenants.
hdi_portfolio_desc: Track billing, finance contact, due date, and adoption per tenant.
hdi_record_desc: Suggested minimum structure for the future HDI customer registry.
hdi_record_contract: Contract: plan, term, amount, adjustment index, contracted seats, and SLA.
hdi_record_billing: Billing: due date, payment method, invoice history, payment proofs, and collections workflow.
hdi_record_contact: Contacts: finance, technical, administrative, executive sponsor, and legal.
hdi_record_adoption: Adoption: active users, recent access, modules used, and engagement trend.
hdi_record_risk: Risk: delinquency, inactive admins, churn risk, open issues, and operational overrides.
hdi_search_accounts: Search accounts by tenant, contact, scope, or status...
hdi_no_accounts: No accounts found for this filter.
hdi_ops_model_desc: Patterns used in modern SaaS/B2B operations consoles.
hdi_ops_model_line1: Separate the customer portal from the platform internal console.
hdi_ops_model_line2: Centralize billing, contract, contacts, and adoption in one account view.
hdi_ops_model_line3: Use progressive alerts, audit trail, and clear account ownership.
login_client_subtitle: Access the dashboard within the scope allowed for your tenant.
login_hdi_subtitle: Internal HDI team access for platform operations and customer support.
login_mode_client_desc: Municipalities, Federal Government, and client tenant teams.
login_mode_hdi_desc: Internal operations, global billing, support, and platform administration.
login_hdi_help: Use this mode for HDI team access. Global access profiles do not depend on a customer tenant to sign in.
login_hdi_contact_admin: If you are part of the HDI team and still do not have access, contact the platform super-admin.
login_no_tenant_identified: No allowed tenant was identified for this email.
login_domain_not_linked: This email domain is not yet linked to a tenant.
hdi_contract_panel_desc: Reserved space for plan, billing cycle, amount, and contract term for this customer.
hdi_contract_placeholder_plan: Contracted plan: define in the contracts module.
hdi_contract_placeholder_cycle: Billing cycle: monthly, yearly, grant, or procurement.
hdi_contract_placeholder_amount: Contract amount, adjustment index, and commercial terms.
hdi_contract_placeholder_term: Start date, end date, renewal, and SLA rules.
hdi_contact_admin_placeholder: Administrative: define owner and primary email.
hdi_contact_technical_placeholder: Technical: define IT or data owner.
hdi_contact_legal_placeholder: Legal: define contract and compliance contact.
billing_search_tenants: Search tenants by name, slug, scope, or status...
billing_no_tenants: No tenants found for this filter.
billing_status_short_description: Reflects warnings and restrictions for the monitored tenant.
